name: Frijoles Con Queso Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Monterey Jack Cheese, grated and packed
A generous amount of Black Pepper
A generous amount of Cayenne Pepper
Oregano, Basil, Salt and Pepper (to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add cream cheese, yogurt, and Monterey Jack cheese to hot beans and mix well.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onion, garlic, and spices in water for 5-8 minutes.
3. Add the sautéed mixture to the bean mixture and stir.
4. Transfer the combined ingredients to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Sauté zucchini for 3 minutes and add tomatoes along with additional spices; let cool.
6. Spread the cooled vegetable mixture on top of the bean mixture.
7. Mix together the dry ingredients for the cornbread topping (cornmeal, flour, salt, baking powder).
8. Beat the yogurt and egg substitute into the dry ingredients.
9. Spread the batter evenly over the beans and vegetables.
10. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
